title: Hopeoides scaphula

This classification is based on the wasp's physical characteristics and its behavior. The family Ichneumonidae is a large and diverse group of wasps, with over 30,000 known species worldwide. As a member of this family, Hopeoides scaphula is likely to be a parasitic wasp that preys on other insects.
uses: Hopeoides scaphula is a plant species, but there is not enough information available about its medicinal uses.
